title: AN ACT TO CREATE THE BARRIO OF BUSGAHAN IN THE CITY OF LIPA

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3357 / 51 OG No. 8, 3875 (August, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1324, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT TO CREATE THE BARRIO OF BUSGAHAN IN THE CITY OF LIPA

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Duhatan, Tagbakin, Initan, Malabong and Halang, all in the barrio of Pinagtungolan, City of Lipa, are separated from the said barrio, and constituted into a separate barrio in the said city to be known as the barrio of Bu√±gahan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
